name: portfolio-pro-monorepo
description: Full-stack professional portfolio builder with admin CMS

scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d && npm run migrate && npm run dev:all
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/admin" "npm run dev -w services/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/admin && npm run build -w services/api
